<function_thought>
I found an unread email from Alice Miller on May 16, 2024, requesting the resume template. Alice mentioned that she cannot access the website to download the template herself. I will now proceed to send her the resume template via email. I need to use the `send_email` function to do that. The email will be sent to Alice at her address: alice.miller@gmail.com, with the subject "Resume Template" and the body indicating that I am attaching the resume template.
</function_thought>
